nasb.text: But the remainder of the people he placed in the hand of Abishai his brother, and he arrayed them against the sons of Ammon.

esv.text: The rest of his men he put in the charge of Abishai his brother, and he arrayed them against the Ammonites.

cnv.text: 他把其餘的人交在他兄弟亞比篩手下，使他們擺陣去迎戰亞捫人。

ccb.text: 把余下的军兵交给他的兄弟亚比筛带领，迎战亚扪人。
